title: Falinskye's
description: A resource pack that turns cats into golems with a nametag!
body:
This resouce pack is my first one- and likewise, this is my first time making something for Modrinth too! I'm sorry if I accidentally set something incorrectly, or failed to detail something important- I'll keep trying to make this better.

# Falinskye's Pack
Currently, this pack aims to replace named cats with golems! If you name a cat with one of the set names, its model will be replaced, as well as its sounds and animations. There's some issues that I'm trying my best to iron out, namely with the sounds sometimes temporarily reverting under certain circumstances.
As of now, there are three special golems and three generic versions of the special ones. I decided to set them up like this since the special golems are intended to act as npc characters on the server I made this for, but I still wanted others to be able to have a similar buddy!

Mirým the first is the tallest golem with a bed of greenery on his head to hold a lovely stack of rocks, and he always carries his bag with him, just in case he finds more rocks!
Stacker Golem is just like Mirým, just without the head accessories and bag.
Name a cat Mirým or Stacker Golem to see them!

Jörb of the Garden is a medium golem with mushrooms and a potted gemtree on his head- something from the lore in my group on a certain server! He's always looking for plants, and he likes to hang around in gardens. 
The Garden Golem is just like Jörb, but without the mushrooms and potted gemtree! 
Name a cat Jörb or Garden Golem to see them!

Yarmýr the Fisher is the shortest golem, and she wears a fishing net around her body with spare bobbers, and a straw hat on top of some kelp- she's a little grumpy, but never plain~
She usually likes to stay by the water's edge, fishing day in, day out.
Docks Golem is just like Yarmýr, but without the net, kelp, and hat!
Name a cat Yarmýr or Docks Golem to see them!

Please note that this uses custom sounds, models, and textures, so the three mods listed in the dependencies section should be needed.

![All the golems sitting in a row!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/020755ea88b4c4600a21673715dc156d12b58568_0.webp)



## Current Pack Status
I only have one set of sounds mixed for the golems right now, which is shared across all the golems added in so far. In the future, I plan to make custom sounds for each, but this will have to do for now!
I have implemented: 

Mirým, a golem designed to stack rocks.

Jörb, a golem designed to help garden and forage.

Yarmýr, a golem designed to fish.

As well as all of their generic variants! 
(This pack is intended for use within a specific group on a server, and the named ones are meant to act as npcs, while the unnamed ones can be for folks that want them as pets themselves! Hence the split)


## In Design

More animations- always~

More sounds



## Requirements
This resource pack uses features from the mods "[Entity Sound Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf)", "[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)", and "[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)". It should require all of them, if I'm not mistaken- if you do run into issues, you can message me on discord with the handle @sweetteademon to report any issues.
